mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.title AS "title", a.icon AS "icon", a.url AS "url", a.sort AS "sort", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_web( id, title, icon, url, sort, del_flag, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{icon}, #{url}, #{sort}, #{delFlag}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_web SET title = #{title}, icon = #{icon}, url = #{url}, sort = #{sort}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
